category_sources: Official README describes nnn as a full-featured terminal file manager.
source_facts.description says tiny, fast, feature-packed file manager.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading and wiki use nnn.
docs_sources: Official GitHub wiki is a documentation surface with usage, configuration, concepts, and troubleshooting.
Official README links features, quickstart, plugins, and wiki.
Official wiki Usage page documents installation, configuration, options, and key usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/jarun/nnn; per instruction, not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official README describes terminal file management, disk usage analysis, plugins, and file picking.
